---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to worksheet behavior or accessibility
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Which worksheet or feature?

Name the worksheet (TVM, Bond, Date, etc.) or feature area.

## What does the physical BA II Plus do that this app does not?

Describe the exact behavior difference.

## Why does this matter for CFA, FRM and other competitive finance exam preparation?

Explain how this affects learning speed, accuracy, confidence, or exam realism.

## Accessibility considerations

Describe expected behavior for blind/low-vision users and screen reader output.

## Proposed solution (optional)

If you have a preferred approach, describe it.

## Additional context

Add examples, manual page references, or related issues.
